list.name: Changes
list.comment: Moving Figure Illustrations to separate folder in Scripts

task.summary: Default task
implemented gridding for bob_e need to check the should_overwrite detection for false positives
testing and validating a 3d meshgrid as a lookup table
fixed local e not accessed in magpy4c1_01.py
clean up terminal outputs
changed logic for restoring last used parameters

amended read_last_used for the CurrentEntryTable class to only run when initializing as the active tab.
Fixed an issue where the Bob_e_Circle_Config class that holds the table widget was not getting the dir_name parameter supplied, causing it to always use the default value

- split up opengui() into a class w/ several functions split into different files for readability
- changed information handling from reading tempfiles to dataclasses to allow IDE-side parameter exposure and dynamic parameter swapping.
- Added scrollbar to the fields selection tab
- Tentative implementation of diagnostic graph page.
* right now, only bob_e graphs are implemented in this new system.
adjustments to widget reading data
updates to the improvements file
minor documentation of the code w/ docutils
minor documentation of the code w/ docutils
minor documentation of the code w/ docutils
minor updates to the "IMPROVEMENTS" file
minor updates to the "IMPROVEMENTS" file
minor updates to improve graphical outputs
Plotly scripts for HDF5 trajectories in a Hexahedron
Plotly scripts for HDF5 trajectories in a Hexahedron
Plotly scripts for HDF5 trajectories in a Hexahedron
Trajectory comparison scripts: HDF5 data in a Hexahedron
Trajectory comparison scripts: HDF5 data in a Hexahedron
Trajectory comparison scripts: HDF5 data in a Hexahedron
added file1 and file2 selection windows and changed the plotted diff trajectory to represent the magnitude of the difference between trajectories.
code updates
code updates
code speedups and 3D visualization added w/ pyvista
code speedups and 3D visualization added w/ pyvista
code plots modified with subplots to plot lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.
codes modified to calculate 3D B and E fields using potential functions and subplots that plot the vector streamlines in 2D and 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.
codes modified to calculate 3D B and E fields using potential functions and subplots that plot the vector streamlines in 2D and 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.
codes modified to calculate B and E fields using vector and scalar potential functions with subplots for the vector streamlines in 2D including 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.

compute ExB (drift) using codes modified to calculate B and E fields using vector and scalar potential functions with subplots for the vector streamlines in 2D including 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.
B(x,y,z) fields in XZ plane calculated from Vector Potential A(x,y,z) for flat magnet coils of variable width plotted on single sheet.

B(x,y,z) fields in XZ plane calculated from Vector Potential A(x,y,z) for flat magnet coils of variable width plotted on single sheet. Added second column with contour plots and finished lineout plots.

B(x,y,z) fields in XZ plane calculated from Vector Potential A(x,y,z) for flat magnet coils of variable width plotted on single sheet. Added second column with contour plots and finished lineout plots.

B(x,y,z) fields in XZ plane calculated from Vector Potential A(x,y,z) for flat magnet coils of variable width plotted on single sheet. Added second column with contour plots and finished lineout plots.
Enhancements to Vector Potential B field scripts. Also adding 3D visualizations
Visualizer used to create illustrations for radially thick hexahedral coils.

Improvements to the B field calculations. One with Biot Savart and the other using the vector potential. More stable with a multi-plane implementation to reduce instabilities. Still does not seem to properly calculate the field intensity in the cusp.
Adding various cusp coil illustrations. Not possible to get perfect diametrical uniformity. Try to use Hexahedron coils with corner coils.
Adding Hexahedron coils with corner coils.
Adding Hexahedron coils with corner coils.
Adding Hexahedron coils with corner coils.
Adding visualizations for the Hexahedral (face) and Octohedral (corner) coils.
Adding visualizations for the Hexahedral (face) and Octohedral (corner) coils.
Adding visualizations for the Hexahedral (face) and Octohedral (corner) coils.
New updates.
Moving B scripts to separate folder in Scripts
Moving B scripts to separate folder in Scripts
Moving Figure Illustrations to separate folder in Scripts

codes modified to calculate 3D B and E fields using potential functions and subplots that plot the vector streamlines in 2D and 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.
codes modified to calculate B and E fields using vector and scalar potential functions with subplots for the vector streamlines in 2D including 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.

compute ExB (drift) using codes modified to calculate B and E fields using vector and scalar potential functions with subplots for the vector streamlines in 2D including 1D lineouts for the field magnitude and gradients.
B(x,y,z) fields in XZ plane calculated from Vector Potential A(x,y,z) for flat magnet coils of variable width plotted on single sheet.

B(x,y,z) fields in XZ plane calculated from Vector Potential A(x,y,z) for flat magnet coils of variable width plotted on single sheet. Added second column with contour plots and finished lineout plots.
Enhancements to Vector Potential B field scripts. Also adding 3D visualizations
Visualizer used to create illustrations for radially thick hexahedral coils.

Improvements to the B field calculations. One with Biot Savart and the other using the vector potential. More stable with a multi-plane implementation to reduce instabilities. Still does not seem to properly calculate the field intensity in the cusp.
Adding various cusp coil illustrations. Not possible to get perfect diametrical uniformity. Try to use Hexahedron coils with corner coils.
Adding Hexahedron coils with corner coils.
Adding visualizations for the Hexahedral (face) and Octohedral (corner) coils.
New updates.
Moving B scripts to separate folder in Scripts
Moving Figure Illustrations to separate folder in Scripts

option.value: Moving Figure Illustrations to separate folder in Scripts
